title: ACWA Power and Snam Sign MoU for Green Hydrogen and Ammonia
content: ACWA Power and Snam have signed an MoU to explore joint investments and collaboration on establishing a green hydrogen supply chain from Saudi Arabia to Europe. The partnership includes evaluating the development of an ammonia import terminal in Italy to support the South H2 Corridor, connecting Saudi Arabia to central Europe. The initiative aims to advance energy security, decarbonization, and the energy transition.
author: Analysts Account
